[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011100010 4
1 0110010000 3
2 1001000011 4
3 1000101010 4
4 0011000101 4
5 0010000110 3
6 1010010010 4
7 0110010000 3

01 10 0010100010 3
12 21 0010000000 1
23 32 0000000000 a
34 43 1000000010 2
45 54 0000000000 a
56 65 0000000100 1
67 76 1000100000 2
70 07 1000100000 2

02 20 0010000000 1
13 31 0001000010 2
24 42 0000000000 a
35 53 0001000001 2
46 64 1000101000 3
57 75 0001000000 1
60 06 1000101000 3
71 17 0001100000 2

03 30 1000000010 2
14 41 0000100010 2
25 52 0010000000 1
36 63 1000000000 1
47 74 1000100000 2
50 05 0010000000 1
61 16 0000100000 1
72 27 0000010000 1

04 40 1000101010 4 match 3
15 51 0011000000 2
26 62 0000000000 a
37 73 1001000000 2
